---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Skill (if applicable)

Which skill? (e.g., `swiftui-pro`)

## Description

What would you like to see?

## Use case

Why is this useful? Describe the scenario.
